Properties

BackgroundSizing

WinUI BackgroundSizing: style default InnerBorderEdge (line 182). See BackgroundSizing for the renderer-mapping note.

public BackgroundSizing BackgroundSizing { get; init; }

Property Value

BackgroundSizing

BorderWidth 

public float BorderWidth { get; init; }

Property Value

float

BrushTransitionMs

WinUI ContentPresenter.BackgroundTransition = BrushTransition 83ms (lines 199-201): a logical state flip (checked↔unchecked↔indeterminate) cross-fades the resting fill via the E3 sparse BrushAnim row instead of snapping. WinUI scopes the transition to Background only; the engine also ramps the border diff — a documented sub-100ms over-coverage. NaN = snap.

public float BrushTransitionMs { get; init; }

Property Value

float

CheckedBackgroundSizing

WinUI flips to OuterBorderEdge while Checked/CheckedPointerOver/CheckedPressed (ToggleButtonCheckedStateBackgroundSizing, lines 6 and 255-257/271-273/287-289).

public BackgroundSizing CheckedBackgroundSizing { get; init; }

Property Value

BackgroundSizing

FocusVisualMargin

WinUI FocusVisualMargin = −3 (ToggleButton_themeresources.xaml:193); the engine draws the ring (E1).

public Edges4 FocusVisualMargin { get; init; }

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
